name: GO MYBIZ
description:
GO MYBIZ (2020)
Secteur d’activité / Sector : Business Software and services
gomybiz.co
Fondateur / Founder
E-mail
Adresse / Address
ACHRAF GABSI
achraf.gabsi@gomybiz.co
Tunis Business Center Immeuble Sarra Boulevard principal 
les berges du lac 1053 Tunis
Activité Notre projet consiste à offrir aux PME/TPE 
une suite de logiciels modulaires et simple d’utilisation qui 
va leur permettre de gérer au mieux leurs relations clients. 
Toute la suite logiciel que nous proposons est en full Cloud 
et se présente sous forme de modules indépendants.
Aspect Technologique La suite que nous proposons est 
développée avec des technologies web de dernière 
génération et elles sont 100.% en Cloud. Vous pouvez y 
accéder depuis votre interface web ou bien depuis votre 
smartphone.
Originalité Il s’agit d’une suite modulaire découpée d’une 
manière bien structurée pour assurer des fonctions 
différentes mais complémentaires. Tous les modules 
sont interconnectés d’une manière native pour assurer la 
transversalité de l’information client quel que soit le point 
de contact avec la possibilité d’évoluer par module selon 
son rythme de croissance et de maturité. Vous ne ratez 
plus aucune interaction avec vos clients et prospect.
Activity Our project consists in offering to small 
and medium-sized companies a modular and easy-to-
use software suite that will allow them to manage their 
customer relationships in the best way. All the software 
suite we propose is in full Cloud and is presented in the 
form of independent modules.
Technological Aspect The suite we offer is developed with 
the latest web technologies and is 100.% cloud-based. 
You can access it from your web interface or from your 
smartphone.
Originality It is a well-structured modular suite designed 
to ensure different but complementary functions. All 
modules are natively interconnected to ensure the cross-
cutting nature of customer information regardless of 
the point of contact, with the possibility of evolving by 
module according to its rate of growth and maturity. You 
no longer miss any interaction with your customers and 
prospects.
FR
EN
tagline: Customer relations in the digital era

products.name: Go Voice
products.description: State-of-the-art business telephony solution offering interactive voice server (IVR), personalized opening hours message, queue, statistics, CTI.

products.name: Go Contact
products.description: Solution for sales and marketing departments covering customer service, prospecting campaigns, appointments, satisfaction surveys, collection, etc.

products.name: Go Sales
products.description: Tool for managing sales force by monitoring opportunities, quotes, and tasks throughout a configurable sales cycle.

# Customer relations in the digital era
A suite of customer relationship management software that allows you to digitalize your customer path from end to end, all in omnichannel
Request a live demo
EmailGet a demo
![](https://gomybiz.co/static/images/draw_gomybiz.svg)
## Your business tresor is your customer
And you must take the unmost care of him in every details.
Take him in charge as soon as he needs
Anticipate its requests by an excellent knowledge of its habits
Listen to him
Give him great satisfaction so he can feel as if he belongs to your brand
Solutions
## A suite of latest generation solutions
that allow your company to manage all new customers relation digital challenges
![Logo GoVoice](https://gomybiz.co/static/images/logo_govoice.svg)Go Voice
### Your telephony on the cloud free up your business
Go voice is a state-of-the-art business telephony solution that o ers all the functionalities a business will need: interactive voice server (IVR), personalized opening hours message, queue, statistics, CTI
[Learn more](https://gomybiz.co/govoice)
![Inbox user interface](https://gomybiz.co/static/images/draw_voice.svg)
![Logo GoContact](https://gomybiz.co/static/images/logo_gocontact.svg)Go Contact
### Take a real care of your customer
For your sales and marketing department, Go Contact is your reference ally for many actions as important as each other: customer service, prospecting campaign and making appointments, satisfaction survey, collection and so on..
[Learn more](https://gomybiz.co/gocontact)
![Customer profile user interface](https://gomybiz.co/static/images/draw_contact.svg)
![Logo GoSales](https://gomybiz.co/static/images/logo_gosales.svg)Go Sales
### Sales Force : be the master on board
And to top it all o , nothing beats a tool for managing your sales force by monitoring in detail all your opportunities, quotes and all the tasks assigned to them throughout a salescycle that you configure by yourself according to your internal process.
[Learn more](https://gomybiz.co/gosales)
![Inbox user interface](https://gomybiz.co/static/images/draw_sales.svg)
##  Start using ours solutions today.Boost your productivity
All our solutions are in SaaS mode and all you need is a simple Internet connection, a browser and everything is up and running. We take care of everything else to ensure the security of your data, high availability to access your services and the necessary backups.
You just have to take care of your business!
[Get a demo](https://gomybiz.co/gocontact)

tavily.answer: Go Mybiz is a high-tech startup focused on CRM solutions, headquartered in Tunis, Tunisia. Wellfound is an online job portal connecting startups with job seekers, based in New York City. Wellfound has received funding and is part of the tech industry.
